title: Ocugen Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Ocugen Q3 2023 Earnings Call Summary. Key Business Developments: Gene Therapy Progress: Ocugen reported positive Phase 1/2 results for OCU400, their first-in-class modifier gene therapy for retinitis pigmentosa (RP) and Leber congenital amaurosis (LCA). The company plans to initiate Phase 3 trials for RP in early 2024, with LCA expansion anticipated in late 2024. Clinical Trial Details: The Phase 3 trial will enroll approximately 100 subjects with one-year follow-up periods. Management stated they are considering a combinatorial approach for primary endpoints and plan an FDA meeting during Q4 2023. Safety & Efficacy Data: Among 12 subjects with minimum six-month follow-up, 83% demonstrated stabilization or improvement across visual acuity measures. For RHO mutation patients specifically, 86% showed improvements in mobility tests. Financial Highlights: Q3 2023 R&D expenses: $6.3 million (down from $15.6 million in Q3 2022). Net loss: $14.2 million ($0.06 per share) for Q3 2023. Cash and investments: $53.5 million as of September 30, 2023. Future Catalysts: Management emphasized that 2024 will be transformative for Ocugen, citing planned Phase 3 initiations, NeoCart facility completion, and NIAID-funded COVID-19 vaccine trial launching in H1 2024.
